title: HLW-001: Bad news
description: Write ShelfOverride implementing ShelfController. Read the count, then diagnostics values from stdin. Print how many values are greater than 100 and divisible by 3.

title: HLW-002: The encrypted gatekeeper is monitoring heat sig...
description: Write ThermalBypass implementing SensorArray. Read the count, then heat readings. Print how many readings are negative or above 500.

title: HLW-003: We’re intercepting a packet stream
description: Write BridgeProtocol implementing BridgeProtocol. Read the count, then IDs. Print the sum of even IDs.

title: HLW-004: The vault uses a "Range-Lock" mechanism
description: Write VaultUnlocker implementing VaultUnlocker. Read the count, then sequence values. Print true if at least three values are between 10 and 20 inclusive.

title: HLW-005: The watchdog timer is scanning for anomalies
description: Write WatchdogBypass implementing WatchdogBypass. Read the count, then stream values. Print the number of anomalies where a value is exactly double the previous value.

title: HLW-006: Security Protocol is failing to compile
description: Write Clue implementing Decryptor. Read a single integer placeholder from stdin and print the bypass shift key computed from bookshelf and student desk values.

title: HLW-007: The server room is overheating
description: Write PurgeUnit implementing CoolantSystem. Read a single numeric placeholder from stdin and print the temperature threshold calculated from roomCount plus serverDensity.

title: HLW-008: The satellite dish is misaligned
description: Write SatelliteDish implementing Uplink. Read a single numeric placeholder from stdin and print the signal frequency calculated by multiplying dishRotation by amplifierGain.

title: HLW-009: The archive vault is locked behind a syntax error
description: Write ArchiveVault implementing Vault. Read a single numeric placeholder from stdin and print the access key calculated as vaultID minus securityDelay.

title: HLW-010: Don't bother running straight to the lobby
description: Write Firewall implementing Mainframe. Read the count, then data values. Print the passkey riddle if the array contains 404; otherwise print LOCKED.

title: HLW-011: The biometric scanner for the armory is offline
description: Write PowerRouter implementing Mainframe. Read the count, then data values. Print the passkey riddle if the sum is greater than 9000; otherwise print LOCKED.

title: HLW-012: A logic bomb has been planted in the ventilatio...
description: Write LogicScanner implementing Mainframe. Read the count, then data values. Print the passkey riddle if two consecutive negative values appear; otherwise print LOCKED.

title: HLW-013: The main elevator requires a secure handshake t...
description: Write ParityCheck implementing Mainframe. Read the count, then handshake packet values. Print the passkey riddle if every number is even; otherwise print LOCKED.
